title: Autoregressive World Generation Pipeline
interaction_flow_video2world: Caller → ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline: generate(inp_prompt, inp_vid, num_input_frames=9, seed=0, sampling_config)
Guardrail → ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline: return is_safe (None if unsafe)
ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline → ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline: _run_model_with_offload(prompt_embedding, prompt_mask, inp_vid, num_input_frames, seed, sampling_config)
ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline → ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline: _run_model(prompt_embedding, prompt_mask, inp_vid, num_input_frames, seed, sampling_config)

ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline → ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline: generate_partial_tokens_from_data_batch(data_batch={video, context, context_mask}, num_tokens_to_generate, task_condition='text_and_video', ...)

ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline → ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline: generate_video_from_tokens(prompt_tokens, latent_shape, video_start_boundary, max_gen_len, sampling_config, logit_clipping_range, context, context_mask)

ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline → AutoRegressiveModel: model.generate(prompt_tokens, temperature, top_p, echo, seed, context, context_mask, max_gen_len, compile_sampling, compile_prefill, stop_tokens) → (generation_tokens, _)
ARBaseGenerationPipeline → diffusion_decoder_process_tokens: diffusion_decoder_process_tokens(model=diffusion_decoder_model, indices_tensor, dd_sampling_config, original_video_example, t5_emb_batch)

diffusion_decoder_process_tokens → LatentDiffusionDecoderModel: model.generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance, state_shape, apply_corruptor=False, preencode_condition=True, num_steps) → samples_latent
diffusion_decoder_process_tokens → ARBaseGenerationPipeline: return out_videos_batch (List[Tensor], normalized to [0,1])
Guardrail → ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline: return output_video (None if unsafe)
ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline → Caller: return output_video (np.ndarray T×H×W×C) or None
interaction_flow_base: Caller → ARBaseGenerationPipeline: generate(inp_vid, sampling_config, num_input_frames=9, seed=0)
ARBaseGenerationPipeline → Caller: return output_video or None

key_methods.ARBaseGenerationPipeline.__init__: Detects model size, creates InferenceConfig, optionally loads diffusion decoder, calls super().__init__
key_methods.ARBaseGenerationPipeline._load_model: Sets up tensor/model parallelism, instantiates AutoRegressiveModel(config, model_parallel)
key_methods.ARBaseGenerationPipeline._load_network: Calls model.load_ar_model(shard_checkpoint, tokenizer_config) with TP shard support
key_methods.ARBaseGenerationPipeline._run_model: Computes latent_context_t_size from supported context lengths, calls generate_partial_tokens_from_data_batch
key_methods.ARBaseGenerationPipeline._run_diffusion_: Enables CP parallelism if needed, calls diffusion_decoder_process_tokens()
key_methods.ARBaseGenerationPipeline.generate_partia: Tokenizes input, iterates samples, calls generate_video_from_tokens per sample
key_methods.ARBaseGenerationPipeline.generate_video_: Calls model.generate() for token sampling, reshapes B(THW)→BTHW, offsets tokens, decodes via video_tokenizer.decode()
key_methods.diffusion_decoder_process_tokens: Splits tokens with overlap, iterates chunks calling model.generate_samples_from_batch(), decodes latents with model.decode(), blends chunks with linear_blend_video_list()

data_flow: Input: inp_vid (Tensor B×T×3×H×W), inp_prompt (str, video2world only)
Text encoding: str → T5 embeddings (Tensor B×512×1024) + mask
Video tokenization: inp_vid → data_tokens (discrete integer tokens) + token_boundaries
Token reshaping: B(THW) → B×T×H×W integer indices (logit offset applied)
Diffusion decode: indices_tensor (B×T×H×W) → samples_latent → pixel_frames ([-1,1]) → blended [0,1]

key_configs.SamplingConfig: temperature, top_p, echo, compile_sampling, compile_prefill, logprobs
key_configs.DiffusionDecoderSamplingConfig: guidance, num_steps, fps, dd_train_num_video_frames, overlap, max_iter, continuous_tokenizer_channel, continuous_tokenizer_spatial_compression_ratio
key_configs.latent_shape: [T, H=40, W=64] for 720p; default video 640×1024, 33 frames

key_relationships: ARBaseGenerationPipeline extends BaseWorldGenerationPipeline (guardrail, text encoder lifecycle)
ARBaseGenerationPipeline calls diffusion_decoder_process_tokens (module-level function in diffusion_decoder/inference.py)
AutoRegressiveModel.generate → produces raw token sequence (autoregressive sampling)
Tokenizer.video_tokenizer.decode → lightweight decode for AR output (preview quality)
LatentDiffusionDecoderModel → full diffusion decode for high-quality output
offload_pattern: All major components (network, tokenizer, diffusion_decoder, text_encoder, guardrail) support optional GPU offload via load/offload method pairs called around inference steps
parallelism: Tensor parallelism (TP) for AR model; Context parallelism (CP) for diffusion decoder; megatron.core parallel_state manages groups
